subcodes.first_line: O leaf of the All-Merciful! Thou art ever remembered in this presence, and amongst the handmaidens of God thou art firm and steadfast [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه رحمانیه همواره در این محضر مذکوری و در بین اماء الله بثبوت و رسوخ
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @love of God, @martyrs and martyrdom
